case_title: BORILLO, SHIELA vs. AMERICAN TASTING INSTITUTE INC., A CALIF.CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORILLO, SHIELA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TASTING INSTITUTE INC., A CALIF.CORP.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORILLO, SHIELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN TASTING INSTITUTE INC., A CALIF.CORP. $3,288.91 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,371.91
